message:
feat(ipc): Cx-first status + pane_state + pane_priority + call_rpc — trail complete (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 77. Finishes the IpcClient Cx-first trail by
adding the 5 remaining public entry points. Each is a trivial
delegate now that tick 77 landed `send_request_with_cx` and
`send_request_with_id_with_cx`.

Additions (all strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `IpcClient::status_with_cx(cx)` — delegates to
    `send_request_with_cx(cx, IpcRequest::Status)`.

  * `IpcClient::pane_state_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` — delegates
    with `IpcRequest::PaneState { pane_id }`.

  * `IpcClient::set_pane_priority_with_cx(cx, pane_id, priority,
    ttl_ms)` — delegates with
    `IpcRequest::SetPanePriority { ... }`.

  * `IpcClient::clear_pane_priority_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` —
    delegates with `IpcRequest::ClearPanePriority { pane_id }`.

  * `IpcClient::call_rpc_with_cx(cx, args, request_id)` — uses
    `send_request_with_id_with_cx` directly (not
    `send_request_with_cx`) because RPC calls carry a
    caller-supplied `request_id` for response correlation.

Regression test (new)
`remaining_ipc_with_cx_entries_match_legacy_on_missing_socket`:

  * One consolidated test covering all 5 new entries.
  * Bogus socket path (temp dir + PID + nanos).
  * For each method, drives the Cx-first variant and asserts
    `UserVarError::WatcherNotRunning` is returned — proves
    every delegate correctly routes through
    `send_request_with_id_with_cx` and hits the socket-exists
    pre-check.

If any delegate accidentally routed through a different code
path (e.g. bypassed the socket check or called the legacy
`send_request`), the error variant would either be different
or the delegate wouldn't compile — the test plus the build
together form the regression guard.

ipc.rs IpcClient Cx-first trail COMPLETE. All 7 public async
entry points + core internal helper have Cx-first siblings:
  * `send_request`/`send_request_with_id` ✓ (tick 77)
  * `ping`                                 ✓ (tick 77)
  * `send_user_var`                        ✓ (tick 77)
  * `status`                               ✓ (tick 78, this commit)
  * `pane_state`                           ✓ (tick 78, this commit)
  * `set_pane_priority`                    ✓ (tick 78, this commit)
  * `clear_pane_priority`                  ✓ (tick 78, this commit)
  * `call_rpc`                             ✓ (tick 78, this commit)

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * ipc:: — 95 passed / 0 failed (tick 77: 94 -> tick 78: 95,
    +1 new consolidated parity test)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (46.80s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
